subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down is verily the sealed Wine from God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم انه لهو الرحیق المختوم من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
